sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Share2, Gift, Users, DollarSign, Copy, CheckCircle, Star, TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; const ReferralPage = () => { const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); const [selectedTab, setSelectedTab] = useState('overview'); const referralCode = 'SWIFT123'; const referralLink = `https://swiftfixpro.com/ref/${referralCode}`; const stats = [ { title: '推荐人数', value: '12', icon: Users, color: 'bg-blue-500' }, { title: '获得奖励', value: '¥240', icon: Gift, color: 'bg-green-500' }, { title: '待确认', value: '3', icon: CheckCircle, color: 'bg-yellow-500' }, { title: '累计收益', value: '¥480', icon: DollarSign, color: 'bg-purple-500' } ]; const rewards = [ { level: 1, requirement: '推荐1人注册', reward: '¥20现金奖励', status: 'completed' }, { level: 2, requirement: '推荐5人注册', reward: '¥50现金奖励', status: 'completed' }, { level: 3, requirement: '推荐10人注册', reward: '¥100现金奖励', status: 'in-progress' }, { level: 4, requirement: '推荐20人注册', reward: '¥200现金奖励', status: 'locked' } ]; const referrals = [ { id: 1, name: '张先生', date: '2024-01-15', status: 'completed', reward: '¥20' }, { id: 2, name: '李女士', date: '2024-01-12', status: 'completed', reward: '¥20' }, { id: 3, name: '王先生', date: '2024-01-10', status: 'pending', reward: '¥20' } ]; const tabs = [ { id: 'overview', name: '概览' }, { id: 'rewards', name: '奖励等级' }, { id: 'referrals', name: '推荐记录' } ]; const handleCopyLink = async () => { try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(referralLink); setCopied(true); toast.success('推荐链接已复制到剪贴板'); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); } catch (err) { toast.error('复制失败，请手动复制'); } }; const handleShare = () => { if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: 'Swift Fix Pro - 物业维护服务', text: '推荐您使用Swift Fix Pro，专业的物业维护服务平台！', url: referralLink }); } else { handleCopyLink(); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

推荐计划

邀请朋友使用Swift Fix Pro，获得丰厚奖励！每推荐一位朋友注册，您将获得现金奖励。

{/* Stats */} {stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.value}
{stat.title}
))}
{/* Main Content */} {/* Referral Link */}

您的推荐链接

{/* How It Works */}

推荐流程

1

分享推荐链接

将您的专属推荐链接分享给朋友

2

朋友注册

朋友通过您的链接注册并完成首次服务

3

获得奖励

朋友完成服务后，您将获得现金奖励

 {/* Sidebar */} {/* Rewards Info */}

奖励说明

基础奖励
每推荐1人获得¥20
¥20
额外奖励
达到等级要求获得额外奖励
¥50-200
朋友优惠
朋友首次服务享受9折优惠
9折
{/* Quick Stats */}

快速统计

本月推荐 5人
本月收益 ¥100
累计推荐 12人
累计收益 ¥240
{/* Tips */}

推荐技巧

在社交媒体分享您的使用体验
向有物业维护需求的朋友推荐
分享具体的服务案例和效果
提醒朋友使用您的推荐码注册
{/* Tabs Section */}
{/* Tab Navigation */}
{tabs.map((tab) => ( ))}
{/* Tab Content */}
{selectedTab === 'overview' && (

推荐概览

推荐进度

{rewards.map((reward) => (
等级 {reward.level}
{reward.requirement}
{reward.reward}
{reward.status === 'completed' ? '已完成' : reward.status === 'in-progress' ? '进行中' : '未开始'}
))}

最近推荐

{referrals.slice(0, 3).map((referral) => (
{referral.name}
{referral.date}
{referral.reward}
{referral.status === 'completed' ? '已完成' : '待确认'}
))}
)} {selectedTab === 'rewards' && (

奖励等级

{rewards.map((reward) => (

等级 {reward.level}

{reward.status === 'completed' ? '已完成' : reward.status === 'in-progress' ? '进行中' : '未开始'}
{reward.requirement}
{reward.reward}
))}
)} {selectedTab === 'referrals' && (

推荐记录

{referrals.map((referral) => ( ))}
推荐人 注册日期 状态 奖励
{referral.name} {referral.date} {referral.status === 'completed' ? '已完成' : '待确认'} {referral.reward}
)}
); }; export default ReferralPage;
